## **ER1.3.  SECTION 3 -- REGULATORY RESULT**

### **ER1.3.1. PANSA NET GAIN/LOSS ON ACTIVITY IN THE POLAND EN ROUTE CHARGING ZONE IN 2025**

PANSA reported a net loss of -11.4 M€, as a combination of a loss of -8.2 M€ arising from the cost sharing mechanism, with a loss of -5.7 M€ arising from the traffic risk sharing mechanism and a gain of +2.6 M€ relating to financial incentives.

### **ER1.3.2. PANSA OVERALL REGULATORY RESULT (RR) FOR THE EN ROUTE ACTIVITY**

Ex-post, the overall RR, taking into account the net loss from the en route activity mentioned above (-11.4 M€) and the actual RoE (+13.9 M€), amounts to +2.5 M€ (1.0% of the en route revenues). The resulting ex-post rate of return on equity is 1.2%, which is lower than the 6.5% planned in the PP.

### **ER1.3.3. NOTES** 

#### **ER1.3.3.1. NOTE 1**

#### **ER1.3.3.2. NOTE 2**

# **TZ1. TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE - POLAND ZONE 1**
